final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-style photo of a stylish Korean cafe coffee and dessert scene, then add meaningful hand-drawn annotations to each element.

Style/medium: needs a Korean cafe aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours; must include smartphone photography feel with hand-drawn annotation overlay (white pen-like thin sketch lines, rough single-stroke uneven quality, contour lines tracing object outlines, arrows and dotted lines for visual guidance)
Composition: must be Instagram-story friendly framing with negative space for annotations
Subject: must include coffee drink and dessert as primary subjects, no people
Scene/backdrop: must be Korean cafe interior setting
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, relaxed atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a trendy, soft aesthetic — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: must include paper-like texture for sketch overlay
Text (verbatim): must include Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji) as short diary-style comments: for drink → taste/temperature/mood words (e.g., さっぱり、やさしい甘み); for food → texture/taste words (e.g., しっとり、最高); for space → atmosphere words (e.g., リラックス、いい時間); for overall → one-line summary (e.g., しあわせすぎる～); must include decorative elements: steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoji-like marks — restrained, with intentional blank space
Constraints: must preserve "Instagram story / magazine rough notes" style; must maintain fashionable yet casual mood; annotations must use arrow/dotted line visual guidance; text must follow 7:3 hiragana:kanji ratio; comments must be short, diary-like, emotional
Avoid: must avoid overcrowding; must avoid excessive decoration; must avoid people in frame
